case_title: PC CONNECTION SALES CORPORATION VS. EXIGEN(USA), INC.

docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PC CONNECTION SALES CORPORATION SERVED JUN-12-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EXIGEN(USA), INC. PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON JUL-13-2007 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PC CONNECTION SALES CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT EXIGEN(USA), INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PC CONNECTION SALES CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT EXIGEN(USA), INC. OEX HEARING SET FOR APR-07-2008 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 612
ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO GREG SHENKMAN CEO OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, EXIGEN(USA), INC. ON APR-07-2008 OFF CALENDAR AT THE REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PC CONNECTION SALES CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXIGEN(USA), INC. $112,680.16 PRINCIPAL, $2,530.74 INTEREST, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $115,545.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
